reviews.comment:
Todo perfecto. Muy buena la atención de los playeros, a veces se juntan varios autos a la espera de cargar combustible, pero hay una darsena para esperar, aunque he notado que el retraso no se debe al despacho de combustible, sino, a que los conductores se quedan dándole charla a los playeros. Funciona todo bien. Para controlar el aire para tomarse un café.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was perfect. The service from the attendants was very good. Sometimes several cars get together waiting to fill up, but there's a waiting area. However, I've noticed that the delay isn't due to the fuel being dispensed, but rather because the drivers are chatting with the attendants. Everything works well. A place to check the air conditioning while getting a coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteU1YblRnEAE
